data.description:
## What
The reference probes in `scripts/jira-pressure-test/` (e2e_field_validation_probe.sh, e2e_validation_probe.sh) call the rebar CLI as `\"\$TICKET_CLI\" ticket <verb>`, but the current CLI has no `ticket` subcommand group — verbs are top-level (`rebar create`, `edit`, `comment`, `tag`, `untag`, `show`, `transition`, `delete`). The probes abort at the first call (`unknown subcommand 'ticket'`). Surfaced while closing tangly-abbey-smelt (the acli split): these probes were the intended live-DIG parity gate but were unrunnable due to this drift.

## Files
- src/.../scripts/jira-pressure-test/e2e_field_validation_probe.sh
- src/.../scripts/jira-pressure-test/e2e_validation_probe.sh

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All `\"\$TICKET_CLI\" ticket <verb>` calls rewritten to `\"\$TICKET_CLI\" <verb>` (create/edit/comment/tag/untag/show/transition/delete); prose comments untouched
- [ ] `bash -n` clean on both probes
- [ ] Smoke: the field probe runs past Phase 1 (local `create` succeeds) — verified without requiring a full live-DIG pass
- [ ] No behavior change beyond the CLI-invocation fix
data.title: De-stale jira-pressure-test probes: rebar ticket <verb> -> rebar <verb>
